Software Developers.description: Research, design, and develop computer and network software or specialized utility programs

Computer Systems Analysts.description: Analyze science, engineering, business, and other data processing problems

Database Administrators.description: Administer, test, and implement computer databases

Network and Computer Systems Administrat.description: Install, configure, and maintain an organization's computer networks

Computer Network Architects.description: Design and implement computer and information networks

Information Security Analysts.description: Plan and carry out security measures to protect an organization's computer networks

Computer and Information Research Scient.description: Conduct research into fundamental computer and information science

Market Research Analysts and Marketing S.description: Research conditions in local, regional, or national markets

Technical Writers.description: Write technical materials, such as equipment manuals and operating procedures

Graphic Designers.description: Design or create graphics to meet specific commercial or promotional needs

Accountants and Auditors.description: Examine, analyze, and interpret accounting records

Financial Analysts.description: Conduct quantitative analyses of information involving investment programs

General and Operations Managers.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the operations of public or private sector organizations

Project Management Specialists.description: Analyze and coordinate the schedule, timeline, procurement, staffing, and budget of a product

Human Resources Specialists.description: Recruit, screen, interview, or place individuals within an organization

Training and Development Specialists.description: Design or conduct work-related training and development programs

Editors.description: Plan, coordinate, revise, or edit written content

Public Relations Specialists.description: Promote or create an intended public image for individuals or organizations

Sales Representatives.description: Sell goods or services to businesses or individuals

Customer Service Representatives.description: Interact with customers to provide information in response to inquiries

Mechanical Engineers.description: Perform engineering duties in planning and designing tools, engines, and machines

Electrical Engineers.description: Research, design, develop, test, or supervise electrical equipment

Civil Engineers.description: Perform engineering duties in planning, designing, and overseeing construction

Industrial Engineers.description: Design, develop, test, and evaluate integrated systems

Biomedical Engineers.description: Apply engineering principles to problems in medicine and health care

Data Scientists.description: Develop and implement methods to transform raw data into meaningful information

Statisticians.description: Develop or apply mathematical or statistical theory and methods

Operations Research Analysts.description: Formulate and apply mathematical modeling and methods to solve problems

Multimedia Artists and Animators.description: Create special effects or animations using film, video, computers, or other media

Art Directors.description: Formulate design concepts and presentation approaches for visual media

Instructional Coordinators.description: Develop instructional material, coordinate educational content, and incorporate technology

Lawyers.description: Represent clients in criminal and civil litigation and other legal proceedings

Paralegals and Legal Assistants.description: Assist lawyers by investigating facts, preparing legal documents, or researching legal precedent

Medical and Health Services Managers.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate medical and health services

Social and Community Service Managers.description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities of a social service program

Business Intelligence Analysts.description: Produce financial and market intelligence by querying data repositories

Content Strategists.description: Develop and implement strategies for digital content creation and distribution
